acceptedAnswer.text: An error code is a diagnostic code displayed by a device (appliance, vehicle, or system) to indicate a specific malfunction or fault.

mainEntity.name: How do I find the error code on my appliance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Error codes are typically displayed on the device's control panel or digital display.

mainEntity.name: What does F21 mean on a Whirlpool washer?

acceptedAnswer.text: F21 indicates a drain timeout error - the washer couldn't drain water within 8 minutes.

mainEntity.name: What does P0300 mean on a car?

acceptedAnswer.text: P0300 is a random/multiple cylinder misfire code.

mainEntity.name: Can I fix the error code myself?

acceptedAnswer.text: Many error codes indicate simple issues that can be fixed DIY-style.
